---
title: "Example RevealJS slides"
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: false
    theme: simple
---

## A slide written in Quarto

- Slides are written in `.qmd`
- The output is an HTML RevealJS presentation
- The same syntax works across course pages and slides

## A code example

```{python}
#| echo: true
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

x = np.linspace(0, 2*np.pi, 200)
plt.plot(x, np.sin(x))
plt.show()
```
